subject: session date
fact: The session takes place on Apr 5th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Apr 5th, 2026

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The party slipped away from a confrontation at the dinner table of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: With chaos erupting below them at the dinner table of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen was involved in a three-way confrontation at the dinner table of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: three-way confrontation they had so carefully engineered between Vraxen, Veperyd, and the High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd was involved in a three-way confrontation at the dinner table of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: three-way confrontation they had so carefully engineered between Vraxen, Veperyd, and the High Inquisitor Veris

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris was involved in a three-way confrontation at the dinner table of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: three-way confrontation they had so carefully engineered between Vraxen, Veperyd, and the High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas noted with unease that their imp guide had vanished in the commotion.
source_quote: Akritas noted with unease that their imp guide had vanished somewhere in the commotion

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur worked the lift mechanism with practiced ease.
source_quote: Felkur wasted no time at the lift access, his expert hands working the mechanism with such practiced ease

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur mocked the archaic Abyssal 23 operating system controlling the lift.
source_quote: couldn't help but mock the archaic "Abyssal 23" operating system controlling it

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur's work on the lift left no trace that anyone had passed through.
source_quote: his flawless work left no trace that anyone had passed through at all

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon a powerful enchantment that stripped away all magical concealment.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon a powerful enchantment that stripped away all magical concealment

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur's fingers grazed the second tile before he stopped.
source_quote: his fingers grazed the second tile

subject: Glyph of Warding
fact: A Glyph of Warding was located on the second tile of the upper corridor floor.
source_quote: a Glyph of Warding that would have detonated in his face

subject: upper corridor
fact: The upper corridor floor was covered in tiles where every tile corresponding to a prime number was a trap.
source_quote: every tile corresponding to a prime number was a trap waiting to be sprung

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur studied the stone golem and concluded it had been keyed to recognize Vraxen by scent alone.
source_quote: Felkur studied it carefully and came to a troubling conclusion: the construct had been keyed to recognize Vraxen by scent alone

subject: stone golem
fact: A stone golem stood before the vault door, silent, immovable, and indifferent to reason.
source_quote: Standing before that door, however, was a stone golem—silent, immovable, and utterly indifferent to reason or argument

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur produced a gadget for extracting unwanted flavors from his pack.
source_quote: Felkur reached into his pack and produced a small, peculiar gadget

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur explained that the Owlbear had picked up Vraxen's scent.
source_quote: the Owlbear had been bouncing on Vraxen's table not long ago and had picked up the arcanaloth's scent in the process

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur extracted the scent and applied it to the stone golem.
source_quote: Felkur extracted it, applied it, and the stone golem stepped silently aside

subject: stone golem
fact: The stone golem stepped silently aside after Felkur applied the scent.
source_quote: the stone golem stepped silently aside

subject: vault
fact: The vault contained a reinforced Mithril door with three distinct locking mechanisms.
source_quote: Beyond the golem lay a reinforced Mithril door with three distinct locking mechanisms

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur dispatched the physical lock on the Mithril door with contemptuous ease.
source_quote: the first of which was a physical lock that Felkur dispatched with almost contemptuous ease

subject: temperature-controlled chamber
fact: The vault revealed a temperature-controlled chamber kept at a constant chill.
source_quote: The door swung open to reveal a temperature-controlled chamber kept at a constant chill

subject: temperature-controlled chamber
fact: The chamber walls were lined with shelves bearing soul coins, infernal ledgers, and contracts.
source_quote: its walls lined floor to ceiling with shelves bearing soul coins, infernal ledgers, and contracts written in the language of devils

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths rested on a pedestal beneath a crystal dome in the center of the vault.
source_quote: At the center of the room, resting on a pedestal beneath a crystal dome, was the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a massive tome bound in devil hide with pages made from processed souls.
source_quote: a massive tome bound in devil hide, its pages made from processed souls that glowed with an eerie inner light

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths automatically updates itself with every infernal contract struck in Maerimydra.
source_quote: automatically updating itself with every infernal contract struck in Maerimydra

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim confirmed through his enchanted sight that the room held no further traps.
source_quote: Bramgrim confirmed through his enchanted sight that the room held no further traps

subject: Transaction 44781
fact: Transaction 44781 records that Felkur Oldenwood sold a priceless artifact to Limping Oric on a night during the Twin Moons of Winter Deep.
source_quote: Transaction 44781: on a night during the Twin Moons of Winter Deep, one Felkur Oldenwood—intoxicated, identification verified, blood alcohol content noted at a remarkable 0.18%—had sold a priceless artifact to a fence named Limping Oric

subject: Felkur Oldenwood
fact: Felkur Oldenwood was intoxicated with a blood alcohol content of 0.18% during the sale of the artifact.
source_quote: one Felkur Oldenwood—intoxicated, identification verified, blood alcohol content noted at a remarkable 0.18%

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric is a fence who bought the artifact from Felkur for forty-five gold pieces.
source_quote: to a fence named Limping Oric for the sum of forty-five gold pieces

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The artifact sold was the Watcher's Eye Brooch belonging to the wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak.
source_quote: The artifact in question was the Watcher's Eye Brooch belonging to the wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch activation
fact: Felkur triggered an ability of the Watcher's Eye Brooch that made its bearer impossible to locate through divination magic.
source_quote: triggering an ability that made its bearer impossible to locate through any form of divination magic

subject: Brotherhood of the Cloak
fact: The wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak descended into paranoia because they could not find the thief.
source_quote: The wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak, unable to find the thief through their most powerful scrying, had descended into paranoia

subject: High investigators execution
fact: High investigators were executed for their failure to produce answers regarding the theft.
source_quote: High investigators had been executed for their failure to produce answers

subject: Phantom Ghost
fact: The shadowy figure responsible for the theft became known in Mulmaster as the Phantom Ghost.
source_quote: the shadowy figure responsible had become known in Mulmaster as the Phantom Ghost

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the party to retrieve the Lexicon.
source_quote: Maram il Vass had sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the party to retrieve the very book they now held in their hands

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur identified a loophole stating the contract was void if the book did not contain the information needed to identify him.
source_quote: the contract obligating them to deliver the Lexicon was only binding so long as the book contained the information needed to identify him. If it didn't, the contract was void

subject: Lexicon entry alteration
fact: Felkur altered his entry in the Lexicon and replaced his own name with that of Veris of Mulmaster.
source_quote: carefully altering his entry in the Lexicon and replacing his own name with that of Veris of Mulmaster

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a person from Mulmaster, a city in Faerûn on the Moonsea.
source_quote: Veris of Mulmaster, a city in Faerûn on the Moonsea

subject: Shard of Crysalized Faerzess
fact: The Shard of Crysalized Faerzess is a large, pure crystal sitting on the vault shelf.
source_quote: the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess—a large, pure crystal sitting on the vault shelf

subject: Shard of Crysalized Faerzess
fact: The Shard of Crysalized Faerzess practically hums with arcane potential.
source_quote: that practically hummed with arcane potential

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur pocketed the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess.
source_quote: Felkur first pocketed the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas stared at Felkur in disbelief after he pocketed the Shard.
source_quote: prompting Akritas to stare at him in disbelief

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear shook its head slowly after Felkur pocketed the Shard.
source_quote: even the Owlbear to shake its head slowly

subject: Phantom Ghost blame attribution
fact: Felkur added a forged entry attributing the theft of the Shard to the Phantom Ghost.
source_quote: He added a forged entry attributing the theft of the Shard to the Phantom Ghost

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur located a hidden door in the vault wall.
source_quote: Felkur located a hidden door in the vault wall

subject: party ascent
fact: The party slipped through the hidden door and climbed upward.
source_quote: the party slipped through it and climbed upward

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The party emerged at the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: emerging at the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: peak chamber
fact: The chamber at the peak was vast and open to the sky.
source_quote: The chamber was vast and open to the sky

subject: sky above peak
fact: The sky above the peak offered nothing but poisonous clouds.
source_quote: the sky above offered nothing but poisonous clouds

subject: flight danger
fact: The poisonous clouds made flight a death sentence.
source_quote: poisonous clouds that made flight a death sentence

subject: teleportation circle
fact: A twenty-foot diameter teleportation circle pulsed at the center of the room.
source_quote: At the center of the room pulsed a twenty-foot diameter teleportation circle

subject: teleportation circle inlay
fact: The teleportation circle's silver inlay glowed with a sickly green light.
source_quote: its silver inlay glowing with a sickly green light

subject: teleportation circle destination
fact: The teleportation circle connected to five predetermined locations deep in the Underdark.
source_quote: that connected to five predetermined locations deep in the Underdark

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur immediately set to work recalibrating the teleportation circle.
source_quote: Felkur immediately set to work recalibrating it

subject: Fae crystals
fact: Felkur used the Fae crystals the party had collected for the recalibration.
source_quote: using the Fae crystals the party had collected

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur moved his fingers across the arcane mechanisms with focused precision.
source_quote: his fingers moving across the arcane mechanisms with focused precision

subject: party
fact: The others took up defensive positions around Felkur.
source_quote: as the others took up defensive positions around him

subject: iron door
fact: The iron door leading to the staircase was the only other way into the chamber.
source_quote: The iron door leading to the staircase was the only other way into the chamber

subject: party
fact: The party moved quickly to hold the iron door.
source_quote: the party moved quickly to hold it

subject: Daein
fact: Daein planted himself against the iron door.
source_quote: Daein and the Owlbear planted themselves against it

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear planted itself against the iron door.
source_quote: Daein and the Owlbear planted themselves against it

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas nocked an arrow.
source_quote: Akritas nocked an arrow

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim stood ready.
source_quote: Bramgrim stood ready

subject: stone golem
fact: The unmistakable grinding of stone on stone announced the stone golem's approach.
source_quote: The unmistakable grinding of stone on stone announced the stone golem's approach

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Behind the stone golem came the furious voice of a visibly injured High Inquisitor Veris.
source_quote: behind it came the furious voice of a visibly injured High Inquisitor Veris

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris bore wounds from the three-way battle below.
source_quote: bearing wounds from the three-way battle below

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris screamed that he would not be framed.
source_quote: screaming that he would not be framed

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris screamed that he would have Felkur's head.
source_quote: that he would have Felkur's head

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris screamed that he would have his revenge.
source_quote: and that he would have his revenge

subject: stone golem
fact: The golem threw itself against the door.
source_quote: The golem threw itself against the door

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris commanded the golem to tear the door from its hinges when brute force alone wasn't enough.
source_quote: Veris commanded it to tear the door from its hinges entirely

subject: stone golem
fact: The golem tore the door from its hinges entirely.
source_quote: which it did

subject: chamber floor
fact: Splinters of iron flew across the chamber when the door was torn off.
source_quote: sending splinters of iron flying across the chamber

subject: Daein
fact: Daein threw himself at the golem in an attempt to shove it back through the opening.
source_quote: Daein threw himself at the golem in an attempt to shove it back through the opening

subject: stone golem
fact: The construct was immovable as a mountain against Daein.
source_quote: but the construct was immovable as a mountain

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear launched itself at the golem with its enchanted claws.
source_quote: The Owlbear, undeterred, launched itself at the golem with its enchanted claws

subject: stone golem
fact: The Owlbear raked deep gouges into the stone golem.
source_quote: raking deep gouges into the stone

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon a powerful ward.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon a powerful ward

subject: spectral guardians
fact: Spectral guardians erupted into being around Bramgrim.
source_quote: spectral guardians erupted into being around him

subject: spectral guardians
fact: The spectral guardians swirled like a storm of divine fury.
source_quote: swirling like a storm of divine fury

subject: stone golem
fact: The spectral guardians battered the golem with relentless force.
source_quote: that battered both the golem and Veris with relentless force

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: The spectral guardians battered Veris with relentless force.
source_quote: that battered both the golem and Veris with relentless force

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur was rendered invisible by Daein's magic.
source_quote: Felkur, rendered invisible by Daein's magic

subject: pillar
fact: Felkur sheltered behind a pillar.
source_quote: and sheltered behind a pillar

subject: eldritch cannon
fact: Felkur deployed his eldritch cannon.
source_quote: deployed his eldritch cannon

subject: cannon blast
fact: Felkur sent a blast of fire roaring into the golem.
source_quote: sent a blast of fire roaring into the golem

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marked the construct with a hunter's mark.
source_quote: Akritas marked the construct with a hunter's mark

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas put an arrow into the golem with practiced precision.
source_quote: and put an arrow into it with practiced precision

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur managed to install the shattered nodes while the battle raged around him.
source_quote: Felkur, even while the battle raged around him, managed to install the shattered nodes

subject: Fae crystals
fact: Felkur rewired the Fae crystals into the portal mechanism.
source_quote: and rewire the Fae crystals into the portal mechanism

subject: portal mechanism
fact: The rewiring stabilized the recalibration.
source_quote: stabilizing the recalibration

subject: Felkur
fact: The stabilization bought the party precious additional time should Felkur's concentration falter.
source_quote: and buying the party precious additional time should his concentration falter

fact: Veris grew increasingly desperate and furious.
source_quote: Veris, growing increasingly desperate and furious

fact: Veris teleported past the frontline entirely.

fact: Veris materialized inside the chamber.

fact: Veris's eyes were burning with rage.

fact: Veris closed the distance to the party.

fact: The teleportation circle continued to pulse and shift as Felkur worked.

fact: The circle's green light flickered toward something new.

fact: The flickering light indicated a way out.

fact: The battle hung in the balance.

fact: Six more agonizing rounds stood between the party and their escape.

fact: Felkur located a hidden door in the vault wall.

fact: Felkur used his expert knowledge of mechanisms and thieves' tools to bypass the lift access.

subject: Shard of Crysalized Faerzess
fact: Felkur pocketed the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess, a large pure crystal.
source_quote: Felkur pockets shard of crystallized Faerzess, a large pure crystal

subject: Shard of Crysalized Faerzess
fact: The Shard of Crysalized Faerzess can enhance Felkur's artificer abilities.
source_quote: that can enhance his artificer abilities

subject: forged entry creation
fact: Felkur created a forged entry in the ledger attributing the theft of the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess to the 'Phantom Ghosts'.
source_quote: Felkur creates a forged entry in the ledger attributing the theft of the Shard of Crysalized Faerzess to the 'Phantom Ghosts'

subject: secret door escape
fact: The party located a secret door within the vault and escaped before the stone golem's fail-safe security reactivated.
source_quote: The party locates a secret door within the vault and escapes before the stone golem's fail-safe security reactivates

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The adventurers climbed to the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: The adventurers climb to the peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning peak
fact: The peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a 60-foot diameter chamber open to poisonous clouds above.
source_quote: a 60-foot diameter chamber open to poisonous clouds above

subject: teleportation circle
fact: The party encountered a 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy.
source_quote: They encounter a 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy

subject: Fae's C crystals
fact: Felkur began recalibrating the teleportation circle using Fae's C crystals.
source_quote: Felkur begins the complex process of recalibrating the teleportation circle using Fae's C crystals

subject: portal recalibration
fact: Felkur began a complex hacking process to recalibrate the teleportation circle requiring intense concentration and multiple arcane adjustments over ten rounds.
source_quote: Felkur begins a complex hacking process to recalibrate the teleportation circle, requiring intense concentration and multiple arcane adjustments over ten rounds

subject: Daein
fact: Daein and the Owlbear positioned themselves to block the single iron door leading to the staircase.
source_quote: Daein and the Owlbear position themselves to block the single iron door leading to the staircase

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear positioned itself to block the single iron door leading to the staircase.
source_quote: Daein and the Owlbear position themselves to block the single iron door leading to the staircase

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas prepared her bow to strike anything that emerged from the stairwell.
source_quote: Akritas prepares her bow to strike anything that emerges from the stairwell

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: An injured High Inquisitor Veris arrived at the door with a stone golem.
source_quote: An injured High Inquisitor Veris and a stone golem arrive at the door

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Veris shouted threats of revenge and fury over the forgery left in the Lexicon.
source_quote: with Veris shouting threats of revenge and fury over the forgery left in the Lexicon

subject: door forced open
fact: Veris commanded the golem to rip the door off its hinges, causing it to smash through.
source_quote: Veris commands the golem to rip the door off its hinges, causing it to smash through

subject: golem shove attempt
fact: Daein attempted to shove the stone golem but failed to move the massive construct.
source_quote: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move the massive construct

subject: owlbear engages golem
fact: The Owlbear engaged the stone golem in melee, striking it with its magical claws.
source_quote: The Owlbear engages the stone golem in melee, striking it with its magical claws

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians, summoning spectral spirits that swirl around the enemies.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, summoning spectral spirits that swirl around the enemies

subject: Spirit Guardians damage
fact: Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians dealt significant damage to both the golem and Varexis.
source_quote: and deal significant damage to both the golem and Varexis

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur, rendered invisible, deployed his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem with fire.
source_quote: Felkur, rendered invisible, deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem with fire

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marked the stone golem with Hunter's Mark.
source_quote: Akritas marks the stone golem with Hunter's Mark

subject: portal stabilization
fact: Felkur successfully installed shattered nodes and re-hardwired the crystals into the portal mechanism, stabilizing the teleportation sequence.
source_quote: Felkur successfully installs shattered nodes and re-hardwires the crystals into the portal mechanism, stabilizing the teleportation sequence

subject: Varexis
fact: Varexis teleported into the room to bypass the frontline defenders.
source_quote: Varexis teleports into the room to bypass the frontline defenders

subject: combat status
fact: The session ended mid-combat on round 4, with 6 rounds remaining before the portal was fully recalibrated.
source_quote: The session ends mid-combat on round 4, with 6 rounds remaining before the portal is fully recalibrated

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is a fire giant stronghold where the party is currently infiltrating a high-security spire.
source_quote: A fire giant stronghold where the party is currently infiltrating a high-security spire

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a tower within Maerimydra hosted by the arcanaloth Vraxen.
source_quote: A tower within Maerimydra hosted by the arcanaloth Vraxen

subject: party infiltration
fact: The party infiltrated the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning posing as merchants.
source_quote: The party infiltrated it posing as merchants

subject: key theft
fact: The party stole a key at dinner.
source_quote: stole a key at dinner

subject: vault ascent
fact: The party worked their way up through trapped corridors, a stone golem, and a high-security vault.
source_quote: worked their way up through trapped corridors, a stone golem, and a high-security vault

subject: The Glyph-Warded Corridor
fact: The Glyph-Warded Corridor is a 50-foot long hallway within the spire.
source_quote: A 50-foot long hallway within the spire

subject: glyph placement
fact: Many tiles in the corridor floor are enchanted with Glyphs of Warding on tiles corresponding to prime numbers.
source_quote: many of which are enchanted with Glyphs of Warding on tiles corresponding to prime numbers

subject: The Vault of Oaths
fact: The Vault of Oaths is a 30-by-30-foot temperature-controlled chamber kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit.
source_quote: A 30-by-30-foot temperature-controlled chamber kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit

subject: soul coins
fact: The walls of the Vault of Oaths are lined with shelves containing soul coins.
source_quote: walls are lined with shelves containing soul coins

subject: infernal ledgers
fact: The walls of the Vault of Oaths are lined with shelves containing infernal ledgers.
source_quote: shelves containing soul coins and infernal ledgers

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths rests on a central pedestal beneath a crystal dome in the Vault of Oaths.
source_quote: with the Lexicon of Oaths resting on a central pedestal beneath a crystal dome

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak
fact: The peak of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a 60-foot diameter chamber at the top of the tower.
source_quote: A 60-foot diameter chamber at the top of the tower

subject: chamber exposure
fact: The peak chamber is open to poisonous clouds above.
source_quote: open to poisonous clouds above

subject: teleportation circle
fact: A 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glows with sickly green energy in the peak chamber.
source_quote: featuring a 20-foot diameter permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy

subject: iron door
fact: A single iron door leads to the interior staircase from the peak chamber.
source_quote: a single iron door leading to the interior staircase

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is an arcanaloth and host of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: An arcanaloth and host of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: golem bypass requirement
fact: Vraxen's scent is required to bypass the stone golem guarding the vault.
source_quote: His scent is required to bypass the stone golem guarding the vault

subject: Vraxen's betrayal plans
fact: Vraxen's personal journal reveals plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: his personal journal—found in the vault—reveals plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fire giant infused with demonic blood who attended the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A fire giant infused with demonic blood who attended the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Veperyd confrontation
fact: Veperyd was drawn into the three-way confrontation engineered by the party.
source_quote: was drawn into the three-way confrontation engineered by the party

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a High Inquisitor of Mulmaster who attended the dinner.
source_quote: A High Inquisitor of Mulmaster who attended the dinner

subject: Veris hunting Felkur
fact: Veris was secretly hunting Felkur.
source_quote: secretly hunting Felkur

subject: Veris injury
fact: Veris was injured from the three-way battle below.
source_quote: Injured from the three-way battle below

subject: Veris pursuit
fact: Veris pursues the party to the top of the spire.
source_quote: he pursues the party to the top of the spire

subject: Veris fury over forgery
fact: Veris is furious over the forgery left in the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: furious over the forgery left in the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Veris teleportation
fact: Veris eventually teleports into the portal chamber to confront the party directly.
source_quote: eventually teleports into the portal chamber to confront them directly

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is the party's loyal sidekick.
source_quote: The party's loyal sidekick

subject: Owlbear commotion
fact: The Owlbear caused a commotion by jumping on the magical table during dinner.
source_quote: caused a commotion by jumping on the magical table during dinner

subject: Owlbear scent pickup
fact: The Owlbear inadvertently picked up Vraxen's scent.
source_quote: inadvertently picking up Vraxen's scent

subject: Owlbear staircase block
fact: The Owlbear used his bulk to help block the staircase door.
source_quote: used his bulk to help block the staircase door

subject: Owlbear golem engagement
fact: The Owlbear engaged the stone golem in melee with his magical claws.
source_quote: engaged the stone golem in melee with his magical claws

subject: Stone Golem
fact: The Stone Golem is a mindless magical construct guarding the vault door.
source_quote: A mindless magical construct guarding the vault door

subject: Stone Golem scent requirement
fact: The Stone Golem requires Vraxen's scent to allow passage.
source_quote: that requires Vraxen's scent to allow passage

subject: Second Stone Golem
fact: A second stone golem later accompanies Varexis to the portal chamber.
source_quote: A second stone golem later accompanies Varexis to the portal chamber

subject: Second Stone Golem door smash
fact: The second stone golem smashes the iron door off its hinges to gain entry.
source_quote: smashing the iron door off its hinges to gain entry

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric is a fence from Daggerford.
source_quote: A fence from Daggerford

subject: Limping Oric purchase
fact: Limping Oric purchased a stolen artifact from a drunken Felkur for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: purchased a stolen artifact from a drunken Felkur for 45 gold pieces

subject: Limping Oric memory loss
fact: Limping Oric could not remember who sold the brooch to him due to the brooch's magic.
source_quote: Due to the brooch's magic, he could not remember who sold it to him

subject: Phantom Ghost legend
fact: Limping Oric's memory loss inadvertently created the legend of the Phantom Ghost.
source_quote: inadvertently creating the legend of the Phantom Ghost

subject: Stolen Key
fact: Daein took the Stolen Key from the obsidian table during the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A key taken by Daein from the obsidian table during the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: key usage
fact: The Stolen Key was used to access the lift and upper levels of the tower.
source_quote: used to access the lift and upper levels of the tower

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a massive tome bound in devil hide and stitched together.
source_quote: A massive tome bound in devil hide and stitched together

subject: Lexicon of Oaths pages
fact: The pages of the Lexicon of Oaths are made from processed souls that glow with an inner light.
source_quote: with pages made from processed souls that glow with an inner light

subject: Lexicon function
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths automatically records and updates all infernal contracts in Maerimydra.
source_quote: It automatically records and updates all infernal contracts in Maerimydra

subject: Felkur sale record
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths contained the record of Felkur's drunken sale of a priceless artifact.
source_quote: it contained the record of Felkur's drunken sale of a priceless artifact

subject: Felkur entry alteration
fact: Felkur subsequently altered the entry regarding the sale in the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: an entry Felkur subsequently altered

subject: The Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch is a priceless artifact belonging to the wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak.
source_quote: A priceless artifact belonging to the wizards of the Brotherhood of the Cloak

subject: Felkur theft
fact: Felkur unknowingly stole the Watcher's Eye Brooch while drunk.
source_quote: that Felkur unknowingly stole while drunk

subject: Felkur sale to Oric
fact: Felkur sold the Watcher's Eye Brooch to Limping Oric for 45 gold.
source_quote: and sold to Limping Oric for 45 gold

subject: Brooch activation
fact: Felkur's drunken fiddling accidentally activated the brooch's special ability.
source_quote: His drunken fiddling accidentally activated its special ability

subject: Brooch divination immunity
fact: The brooch makes the wearer impervious to being located by divination magic.
source_quote: making the wearer impervious to being located by divination magic

subject: Shard of crystallized Faerzess
fact: Felkur pocketed a Shard of crystallized Faerzess found in the vault.
source_quote: A large, pure crystal found in the vault and pocketed by Felkur

subject: Shard function
fact: The Shard of crystallized Faerzess functions like a wand of the mage for an artificer's abilities.
source_quote: It functions like a wand of the mage for an artificer's abilities

subject: Shard bonus
fact: The Shard of crystallized Faerzess grants a bonus to any artificer ability used.
source_quote: granting a bonus to any artificer ability used

subject: Faerzess Crystals from Singed Veil
fact: The party collected specialized arcane crystals from Singed Veil prior to this session.
source_quote: Specialized arcane crystals collected by the party prior to this session

subject: Faerzess recalibration
fact: Felkur used the Faerzess Crystals from Singed Veil to recalibrate the permanent teleportation circle at the spire's peak.
source_quote: used by Felkur to recalibrate the permanent teleportation circle at the spire's peak

subject: Faerzess time buffer
fact: Felkur used the Faerzess Crystals from Singed Veil to buy additional time in case concentration is lost.
source_quote: and buy additional time in case concentration is lost

subject: Scent Extraction Mechanism
fact: The Scent Extraction Mechanism is one of Felkur's personal gadgets originally kept to extract unpleasant flavors from food.
source_quote: One of Felkur's personal gadgets, originally kept to extract unpleasant flavors from food

subject: Scent extraction from Owlbear
fact: Felkur used the Scent Extraction Mechanism to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear.
source_quote: Used here to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear

subject: Golem deception
fact: The extracted scent allowed the party to fool the stone golem's security measure.
source_quote: so the party could fool the stone golem's security measure

subject: Eldritch Cannon
fact: Felkur deployed an Eldritch Cannon during the portal chamber battle.
source_quote: A magical device deployed by Felkur during the portal chamber battle

subject: Eldritch Cannon firing
fact: The Eldritch Cannon fires blasts of fire at enemies.
source_quote: that fires blasts of fire at enemies

subject: Felkur concentration
fact: Felkur maintained concentration on recalibrating the teleportation circle while the Eldritch Cannon fired.
source_quote: while he maintains concentration on recalibrating the teleportation circle

subject: Magical Mandolin
fact: The Magical Mandolin is an instrument belonging to Daein used to channel magic.
source_quote: An instrument belonging to Daein used to channel magic

subject: Invisibility spell casting
fact: Daein used the Magical Mandolin to cast an invisibility spell on Felkur during the portal chamber battle.
source_quote: specifically employed to cast an invisibility spell on Felkur during the portal chamber battle

subject: True Seeing cast
fact: Bramgrim cast True Seeing to see through illusions and magical concealment.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to see through illusions and magical concealment

subject: Tile identification
fact: Bramgrim used True Seeing to identify which tiles in the corridor were trapped with Glyphs of Warding.
source_quote: Used first to identify which tiles in the corridor were trapped with Glyphs of Warding

subject: Vault trap confirmation
fact: Bramgrim maintained True Seeing into the vault to confirm the room was free of additional traps.
source_quote: and maintained into the vault to confirm the room was free of additional traps

subject: Secret door location
fact: Bramgrim used True Seeing to help locate a secret door.
source_quote: and to help locate a secret door

subject: Glyph of Warding
fact: Glyphs of Warding are magical traps placed on specific floor tiles in the corridor corresponding to prime numbers.
source_quote: A magical trap placed on specific floor tiles in the corridor corresponding to prime numbers

subject: Glyph explosion trigger
fact: The Glyphs of Warding are designed to explode if stepped upon by unauthorized individuals.
source_quote: designed to explode if stepped upon by unauthorized individuals

subject: Glyph detection by Felkur
fact: Felkur detected the Glyphs of Warding via investigation.
source_quote: Detected by Felkur's investigation

subject: Glyph revelation by Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's True Seeing fully revealed the Glyphs of Warding.
source_quote: and later fully revealed by Bramgrim's True Seeing

subject: Sanctuary cast
fact: Bramgrim cast Sanctuary on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting the gnome with direct melee attacks.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting the gnome with direct melee attacks

subject: Sanctuary purpose
fact: Bramgrim cast Sanctuary while Felkur concentrated on recalibrating the teleportation circle.
source_quote: while he concentrated on recalibrating the teleportation circle

subject: Invisibility cast
fact: Daein cast Invisibility using his magical mandolin to hide Felkur from sight.
source_quote: Cast by Daein using his magical mandolin to hide Felkur from sight

subject: Felkur hiding
fact: The Invisibility spell allowed Felkur to work on the portal's mechanisms from behind a pillar without being easily targeted.
source_quote: allowing the gnome to work on the portal's mechanisms from behind a pillar without being easily targeted

subject: Spirit Guardians cast
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians at fifth level.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim at fifth level

subject: Spirit Guardians summoning
fact: Spirit Guardians summoned spectral guardians that swirled around both the stone golem and Varexis.
source_quote: summoning spectral guardians that swirled around both the stone golem and Varexis

subject: Golem damage
fact: The Spirit Guardians dealt significant damage to the stone golem.
source_quote: dealing significant damage to the golem

subject: Varexis resistance
fact: Varexis resisted the Spirit Guardians partially.
source_quote: while Varexis resisted partially

subject: Hunter's Mark cast
fact: Akritas placed a Hunter's Mark mystical brand on the stone golem.
source_quote: A mystical brand placed by Akritas on the stone golem

subject: Hunter's Mark effect
fact: The Hunter's Mark increases the damage of Akritas's strikes against the stone golem.
source_quote: to increase the damage of her strikes against it
